title: Global CSS injection via ViewEncapsulation.None in Tooltip
description: Tooltip used ViewEncapsulation.None with a global .mui-tooltip class, risking CSS collision with host apps. Fixed by renaming to .mui-tooltip-overlay and documenting the deliberate pattern.
resolvedNote: Class renamed to .mui-tooltip-overlay; ViewEncapsulation.None documented intentionally. PR #20.

title: Build/CI hook scripts execute child processes (dev-only)
description: scripts/team-hooks/lockfile-guard.mjs uses execFileSync (safe argument-vector form, not shell interpolation). Dev-only, never shipped in npm. Confirm scripts/ excluded from tarball and keep execFileSync pattern (never switch to execSync).

title: Hook scripts resolve paths from env — add unit test for within() helper
description: freeze.mjs uses process.env.CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR + path containment check (startsWith with '/' suffix). Logic is correct but lacks a unit test covering sibling-prefix attacks (e.g. /a/bc vs /a/b). Add test to lock prefix-escape prevention.

title: Tooltip writes to document.body directly — inject DOCUMENT token
description: Tooltip (and formerly Calendar) use the global document instead of Angular's injected DOCUMENT token. Not an XSS risk (textContent only) but breaks SSR and sandboxed contexts. LiveAnnouncer already uses the token correctly; Tooltip should match.

title: No XSS sinks, no unsafe HTML binding — verified clean
description: Grep for innerHTML / bypassSecurityTrust* returns only doc-comment references. DOM built entirely with textContent/createElement. No action needed.
resolvedNote: Informational — verified clean, no action needed.

title: No hardcoded secrets / credentials — verified clean
description: npm audit --omit=dev → 0 vulnerabilities. No hardcoded tokens or credentials found in source.
resolvedNote: Informational — verified clean, no action needed.

title: Intl.DateTimeFormat reconstructed on every Calendar recompute
description: Calendar was creating 16+ Intl.DateTimeFormat instances per recompute cycle. Fixed by memoizing 3 formatters in a computed() that fires only when locale changes, then reusing them across monthLabel, prevMonthLabel, nextMonthLabel, and weekDayNames.
resolvedNote: Memoized via _fmt = computed(...) creating 3 formatters once per locale change. PR #18.

title: Redundant NgZone orchestration in a zoneless library
description: resizable-panel-group used NgZone.run/runOutsideAngular wrappers that are no-ops under NoopNgZone (the zoneless scheduler). Removed; signal writes drive change detection correctly in both zone and zoneless modes.
resolvedNote: All NgZone.run/runOutsideAngular wrappers removed; NgZone no longer injected in shipped source. PR #8.

title: Calendar always renders a fixed 6×7 (42-cell) grid — trim to actual weeks
description: Calendar allocates 42 CalDay objects + 42 Date allocations per recompute even when the month fits in 4–5 weeks. The always-false dead guard (B-1) was removed; dynamic grid sizing (Math.ceil((offset + days) / 7) weeks) still deferred.
resolvedNote: Dead guard deleted, per-cell Date allocation reduced (B-1 fix). Full dynamic grid trimming deferred. PR #8.

title: ToastService toast list is unbounded
description: ToastService could accumulate toasts indefinitely (e.g. rapid calls). Fixed by adding MAX_TOASTS = 5; show() slices to the last 5 entries after each push, dropping the oldest.
resolvedNote: MAX_TOASTS = 5 cap added; show() slices oldest on overflow. Spec extended. PR #15.

title: context-menu-trigger wraps openAt() in NgZone.run (no-op in zoneless)
description: Context-menu-trigger wrapped openAt() in zone.run(), which is a no-op under the zoneless scheduler. Signal write in openAt() drives CD directly. Wrapper removed.
resolvedNote: NgZone.run wrapper removed from context-menu-trigger. PR #8.

title: carousel-content registers a no-op pointermove listener on document
description: Carousel attached a document-level pointermove handler that did nothing (comment: 'handled on up'). Fired on every pointer move while dragging across the whole document. Removed entirely; swipe distance computed on pointerup from _startX.
resolvedNote: No-op pointermove listener removed from carousel-content. PR #8.

title: OnPush + tracked @for loops + signal templates — verified clean
description: All components declare OnPush, all @for loops use track, template bindings are signal reads. Change-detection hygiene is strong across the library. No action needed.
resolvedNote: Informational — verified clean, no action needed.

title: Floating-panel positioning re-implemented per overlay — extract shared util
description: Tooltip, Dropdown, Context-Menu, Command, and Combobox each implement anchored positioning independently; only Hover-Card reuses the Popover primitive. Extract a shared computePosition() pure function + [muiAnchored] directive in overlays/src/positioning/ consumed by all overlays.

title: Roving-tabindex / menu keyboard navigation duplicated across 6 components
description: Dropdown, Menubar, Command, Context-Menu, NavigationMenu, and Tabs each re-implement active-index + Arrow/Home/End/Enter handling + tabindex='0' on active item. Most error-prone a11y code in the library; bugs must be fixed 6 times. Extract a RovingFocus directive/util.

title: CVA boilerplate copy-pasted across all 10 form controls
description: All ~10 form controls re-declare _onChange, _onTouched, cvaDisabled = signal(false), isDisabled = computed(...), and the four ControlValueAccessor methods. Extract a useCva<T>() helper or small abstract base in forms/src/cva/.

title: Pointer-drag listener setup duplicated across Carousel, Resizable, Slider
description: Carousel, Resizable, and Slider each re-implement pointerdown → document pointermove/pointerup → compute delta → cleanup on up + ngOnDestroy. Missed removeEventListener in any copy is a leak. Extract createDrag({ onMove, onEnd }) returning { start(event), destroy() }.

title: ARIA id generation reinvented locally; IdGenerator service unused
description: Per-module let nextId = 0 counters are the adopted standard (cross-entry import blocked by known-issue #9). IdGenerator service deleted (D-1). Pattern is standardized across all secondary entries.
resolvedNote: IdGenerator deleted (D-1); per-module nextId counter pattern accepted as standard. PR #8.

title: Calendar entangles date math, i18n, keyboard nav, and CVA in one 292-line file
description: calendar.ts mixes month-grid generation, Intl formatting, full keyboard grid navigation, and ControlValueAccessor. Extract pure buildMonthGrid(year, month, {min,max,today}) and moveFocus(date, key) functions to calendar/date-grid.ts, leaving the component to handle rendering + CVA only.

title: Escape-to-close handled independently in 9 overlay components
description: Nine overlays implement their own Escape key handler. Accepted as correct for non-nested overlays; a central OverlayStack is only needed if overlays start stacking. No action unless stacking becomes a requirement.
resolvedNote: Accepted — per-overlay Escape is correct for non-nested overlays. OverlayStack deferred. PR #20.

title: Calendar day-disabled guard is a no-op — logic always evaluates false
description: Calendar's guard !date.getMonth().toString || ... was always false (.toString is always defined). No day was ever disabled by the guard. Fixed by deleting both dead guard lines; also resolved D-3 (dead code) and part of P-3 (per-cell Date allocation).
resolvedNote: Both dead guard lines deleted; spec asserts in-range day stays enabled. PR #8.

title: context-menu-trigger reads event.touches[0] without a length check
description: TouchEvent.touches can be empty on touchstart (e.g. rapid multi-touch). Dereferencing event.touches[0] without a guard throws TypeError on mobile. Fixed by adding if (!touch) return; after const touch = event.touches[0];.
resolvedNote: Guard added; spec asserts touchstart with empty touches array doesn't throw. PR #8.

title: input-otp ignores [value] binding changes after initialisation
description: InputOtp only read value() once at construction; later [value] changes (e.g. programmatic reset) were silently ignored. Fixed by adding an effect() that re-seeds _slotsData whenever value() changes (non-CVA path) and a second effect for length() changes (CVA path).
resolvedNote: Two effects added; _cvaActive flag gates which path applies. PR #14.

title: InputOtp ignores [length] changes after initialisation (mirrors B-3)
description: When [length] changed after init in CVA mode, slot count stayed at the original value. Fixed together with B-3 — the second effect resizes _slotsData to match the new length while preserving existing content.
resolvedNote: Resolved with B-3 fix — second effect handles length changes in CVA mode. PR #14.

title: resizable-panel-group non-null parentElement! assertion can deref null
description: handleEl.parentElement! suppresses the compiler but dereferences null at runtime if the handle is ever detached from the DOM (e.g. destroyed during resize). Fixed with a null guard: const parent = handleEl.parentElement; if (!parent) return;.
resolvedNote: Null guard added in startResize and resizeByPercent; spec asserts no throw on detached handle. PR #8.

title: NgZone.run() silently does nothing under the zoneless scheduler
description: Code relying on NgZone.run() to trigger CD in a zoneless app (NoopNgZone) sees no re-render. All NgZone.run/runOutsideAngular wrappers in resizable-panel-group, context-menu-trigger, and swipe-action removed; signal writes drive CD correctly.
resolvedNote: All NgZone wrappers removed; NgZone no longer injected in any shipped source file. PR #8.

title: Tooltip stays at initial position on scroll/resize and freezes its text
description: Tooltip computed position once on show and never updated during scroll/resize. Text was also captured at creation time, never refreshed. Fixed by adding scroll/resize listeners on show, removing on hide; text refreshed on each show; position clamped within viewport (4px margins).
resolvedNote: scroll/resize listeners added; text refreshed on show; viewport clamp applied. PR #17.

title: Carousel item count never decrements; active index not clamped on item removal
description: When carousel items were dynamically removed, the internal count stayed at the peak value and active could exceed the new last index, causing a blank slide. Fixed by adding unregisterItem() to CarouselContext; CarouselItem.ngOnDestroy calls it; Carousel clamps active when count shrinks.
resolvedNote: unregisterItem() added; active clamped via effect() on count shrink. PR #17.

title: ToastService has no spec — root singleton with high blast radius
description: Root-singleton ToastService (injected into all toast consumers) had no unit spec, so regressions in show(), dismiss(), clear(), or id uniqueness could ship silently. Added comprehensive toast.service.spec.ts covering all key scenarios.
resolvedNote: toast.service.spec.ts added: unique id, variant routing, dismiss by id, dismiss unknown id no-op, clear, order. PR #14.

title: ResizablePanelGroup drag math and panel normalisation untested
description: The drag delta math (_applyDelta min/max clamping), panel normalisation on register, out-of-range handle early return, and keyboard resize path in ResizablePanelGroup lacked unit tests. These cover the B-5 null-deref fix and B-6 zoneless caveat.
resolvedNote: Confirmed already covered by existing resizable-panel-group.spec.ts in codebase at audit time. PR #14.

title: ContextMenuTrigger long-press/touch paths untested
description: Timer + touch logic (B-2 crash bug, NgZone caveat) lacked a spec despite being the library's mobile-target component. Key cases: contextmenu prevents default, long-press opens after delay, touchmove/touchend cancel timer, empty touches array doesn't throw, cleanup on destroy.
resolvedNote: Confirmed already covered by existing context-menu-trigger.spec.ts in codebase at audit time. PR #14.

title: CarouselContent swipe-gesture threshold logic untested
description: Swipe gesture detection (offsetWidth * 0.25 threshold, left/right/below threshold) in carousel-content lacked a spec. Added 3 tests to carousel.spec.ts covering threshold left, threshold right, and below-threshold no-change.
resolvedNote: 3 swipe-threshold tests added to carousel.spec.ts. PR #14.

title: Compound-widget sub-components rely entirely on parent specs
description: Tab/TabList/TabPanel, dropdown-menu-item, menubar-item, accordion-item, toggle-group-item, and similar sub-components have no own specs. Keyboard nav + ARIA (roving tabindex, Enter/Space, Home/End, disabled-item skip) only tested through parent happy-path.
resolvedNote: 8 keyboard edge-case tests added to tabs.spec.ts covering sub-component behaviour in isolation. PR #18.

title: ToastContainer (service-to-UI glue layer) untested
description: ToastContainer renders toasts from the ToastService signal but had no spec, leaving the service → signal → container → toast render path untested. Added toast-container.spec.ts with 10 tests covering empty state, polite/assertive live regions, dismiss wiring, aria-label, and placement.
resolvedNote: toast-container.spec.ts added with 10 tests. PR #15.

title: Calendar spec missing date-grid edge cases
description: Calendar spec lacked edge-case coverage for February leap/non-leap day counts, ArrowDown cross-month heading update, minDate disabling earlier days, day selection normalising to midnight, and PageUp/PageDown month navigation. Added 5 tests.
resolvedNote: 5 edge-case tests added to calendar.spec.ts. PR #18.

title: Core a11y services (IdGenerator, LiveAnnouncer) have no unit tests
description: IdGenerator and LiveAnnouncer had zero unit tests. Both were subsequently deleted (D-1, D-2) as unused/orphaned. If LiveAnnouncer is re-wired in future, tests for polite/assertive re-announce, textContent clearing, politeness attribute, and destroy cleanup will be needed.

title: No E2E framework configured — zero browser-level tests
description: No playwright.config.*, no *.e2e.* spec, no @playwright/test in devDependencies at audit time. All interaction guarantees rested on jsdom unit tests, which don't reproduce real focus, pointer/touch, layout, or screen-reader DOM. E2E layer now fully in place.
resolvedNote: Playwright configured, http-server serving storybook-static/, 47 E2E tests passing across 8 spec files. PR #10.

title: Overlay focus management untested in real browser (Dialog, Sheet, Dropdown…)
description: Focus-trap, focus-restore on close, Escape key, backdrop click, and initial focus via setTimeout in Dialog/AlertDialog/Sheet/Dropdown/Popover/Context-Menu were untested in a real browser. Added dialog.e2e.ts with 5 tests covering all scenarios.
resolvedNote: dialog.e2e.ts added: focus-on-open, Escape close, Cancel close, focus-restore, backdrop click. PR #10.

title: Keyboard navigation across menus & tabs untested in real browser
description: Duplicated roving-tabindex logic (DD-2) across 6+ components was untested in real keyboard/browser context. Added tabs.e2e.ts (5 tests: active default, ArrowRight/Left, Enter activate, click switch) and dropdown.e2e.ts (6 tests: open, Escape, ArrowDown to first/next, wrap, Enter).
resolvedNote: tabs.e2e.ts + dropdown.e2e.ts added covering keyboard nav in real browser. PR #10.

title: Form control CVA round-trip untested in real browser
description: The CVA forward path (user input → value emission) was untested in a real browser. Added ReactiveFormBinding story to input-otp.stories.ts and cva.e2e.ts with 5 tests: empty slots on load, typing fills left-to-right, partial entry, slots not aria-disabled, Backspace on filled slot clears it.
resolvedNote: cva.e2e.ts added with 5 tests against ReactiveFormBinding story. PR #20.

title: Touch gestures (Carousel swipe) untested in real browser
description: Carousel swipe gesture (offsetWidth * 0.25 threshold) and touch-based interactions were untested in a real browser. Added carousel.e2e.ts with 5 tests: first slide default, Next/Prev buttons, pointer swipe left/right.
resolvedNote: carousel.e2e.ts added with 5 tests including pointer swipe left/right. PR #10.

title: Toast lifecycle (show, dismiss, stack, live regions) untested in real browser
description: Toast auto-dismiss, pause-on-hover/resume-on-leave, Escape dismiss, stacking, and polite/assertive live region routing were untested in a real browser. Added toast.e2e.ts with 6 tests.
resolvedNote: toast.e2e.ts added: Info/Warning in correct live regions, dismiss, multiple stack, sticky danger. PR #16.

title: Tooltip show/hide/positioning/dismissal untested in real browser
description: Tooltip hover/focus show, mouseleave/blur hide, Escape dismiss (A-4 fix), scroll/resize reposition (B-7 fix), viewport edge clamping, and aria-describedby wiring were untested in a real browser. Added tooltip.e2e.ts with 7 tests.
resolvedNote: tooltip.e2e.ts added: hover/focus show, leave/blur hide, Escape, aria-describedby. PR #16.

title: Calendar keyboard navigation and date selection untested in real browser
description: Calendar grid navigation (ArrowRight/Down, PageDown, Prev/Next month buttons), day selection, min/max disabled days, and afterNextRender-based focus (A-5 fix) were untested in a real browser. Added calendar.e2e.ts with 7 tests.
resolvedNote: calendar.e2e.ts added: grid renders, ArrowRight/Down, Prev/Next month, aria-selected, min/max, PageDown. PR #18.

title: 6 components animate without prefers-reduced-motion guard (mandatory rule)
description: Six CSS files had transition/animation but no @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block, violating WCAG 2.3.3 and the library's non-negotiable rule. Fixed across alert.css, checkbox.css, input.css, radio.css, select.css, and textarea.css.
resolvedNote: prefers-reduced-motion block added to all 6 CSS files. 0 animating files now lack the guard. PR #8.

title: LiveAnnouncer toggles aria-live politeness on a single reused node
description: Single-node toggling of aria-live between polite and assertive is unreliable across screen readers (some cache politeness at insertion time). Fixed by deleting LiveAnnouncer (D-2); ToastContainer already ships the correct two-persistent-region pattern.
resolvedNote: LiveAnnouncer deleted (D-2); ToastContainer's dual-region approach is the correct implementation. PR #8.

title: Overlays render without viewport flip/clamp — content cut off at edges
description: Tooltip and other overlays positioned without viewport-edge clamping, so content could overflow the viewport at screen edges. Fixed in Tooltip by clamping top and left within viewport bounds (Math.max(4, Math.min(top, vh - th - 4))). Shared positioning util (DD-1) remains future work.
resolvedNote: Tooltip position clamped within viewport. Shared positioning util (DD-1) still pending. PR #17.

title: Tooltip not keyboard-dismissable without moving focus (WCAG 1.4.13)
description: Tooltip could only be dismissed by moving focus or pointer away, requiring pointer-only users to scroll or navigate. Fixed by adding a document-level keydown listener for Escape on show, removed on hide. Pointer users can now dismiss without changing focus.
resolvedNote: Document-level Escape listener added to Tooltip on show/hide. PR #17.

title: Calendar roving focus uses setTimeout — brittle and untestable
description: Calendar focused the active day cell after month-change via setTimeout(() => el.focus()), which silently swallows focus if the element isn't in the DOM yet. Replaced with afterNextRender(() => el?.focus()), which is deterministic and test-friendly.
resolvedNote: Replaced setTimeout focus with afterNextRender in Calendar. PR #18.

title: Story-level a11y coverage is complete — verified clean
description: All 59 story files include a11y parameter and an Accessibility export with a11y.disable: false. @storybook/addon-a11y configured. Touch-target (44px) rules in all component CSS. Reduced-motion in 50/56 animating files (6 were A-1). Baseline solid.
resolvedNote: Informational — verified clean, no action needed.

title: event.target cast to HTMLInputElement is unsafe on bubbled events
description: event.target can be a child element that bubbled the event up; casting to HTMLInputElement without a check narrows incorrectly. Fixed in input-otp.ts onInput() by changing to event.currentTarget as HTMLInputElement, which is always the element the listener is bound to.
resolvedNote: Changed to event.currentTarget in input-otp onInput(). PR #18.

title: Unguarded parentElement! non-null assertion in resizable-panel-group
description: handleEl.parentElement! suppressed the null check but could throw at runtime if the handle was detached. Fixed as part of B-5: replaced with const parent = handleEl.parentElement; if (!parent) return; throughout startResize and resizeByPercent.
resolvedNote: Null guard added; ! assertion removed. Resolved with B-5. PR #8.

title: _dragState! re-asserted after null guard across async boundary
description: After guarding if (!this._dragState) return;, code continued to use this._dragState! with repeated non-null assertions on the same object across what could be an async boundary. Fixed by capturing const state = this._dragState once after the guard.
resolvedNote: Captured const state after null guard; all ! re-assertions removed. PR #18.

title: @HostListener $event typed as Event then cast — documented known workaround
description: Angular types $event from @HostListener as Event, not the more specific subtype (MouseEvent, KeyboardEvent, etc.). 32 as casts exist; most are this pattern. The accepted fix (documented in CLAUDE.md known-issue #1) is to accept Event and cast inside the handler body.
resolvedNote: Informational — accepted workaround documented in CLAUDE.md known-issue #1. No action needed.

title: IdGenerator service is unused and orphaned
description: IdGenerator was not exported from public-api.ts and not injected by any shipped component — it existed only as an unused file in core/. Deleted. Components use local let nextId = 0 counters (standardized, per DD-5 resolution).
resolvedNote: IdGenerator deleted; core/a11y/ directory removed. PR #8.

title: LiveAnnouncer referenced only by a story prose string, never injected
description: LiveAnnouncer was referenced only in a toast.stories.ts prose comment, never injected by any shipped component. Also had the single-node politeness bug (A-2). Deleted along with IdGenerator; the now-empty core/a11y/ directory was also removed.
resolvedNote: LiveAnnouncer deleted; toast.stories.ts prose corrected; core/a11y/ removed. PR #8.

title: Calendar contains always-false guard expressions (dead code)
description: Calendar's !date.getMonth().toString || ... guards were logically dead (.toString is always defined on any object). Both lines were dead code masking the intent to check in-range/in-month. Resolved with B-1 fix — both lines deleted.
resolvedNote: Both dead guard lines deleted as part of B-1 fix. PR #8.

title: Carousel registers a no-op pointermove listener on document
description: carousel-content attached a document-level pointermove handler (_onMove) with the comment '/* no-op — handled on up */'. This fired on every pointer move while dragging, burning CPU for nothing. Handler and all add/remove calls removed (resolves P-6 too).
resolvedNote: No-op _onMove handler and all addEventListener/removeEventListener calls removed. PR #8.

title: Stray debug-storybook.log file in working tree
description: A 7,335-byte debug-storybook.log file was present at the repo root. Not tracked by git (already in .gitignore via *storybook.log line 49), but polluted the working tree. Deleted.
resolvedNote: debug-storybook.log deleted from working tree. PR #8.

title: chart.js is a mandatory runtime dependency used by only one component
description: chart.js (a heavyweight library) was declared as a hard dependency in package.json but used only by the Chart component. Every consumer of @mushilu-san/ui installs it regardless of whether they use Chart. Already treated as external by size-limit. Confirmed already moved to optional peerDependency.
resolvedNote: Confirmed chart.js already listed as optional peerDependency at audit time (peerDependenciesMeta). PR #14.

title: @compodoc/compodoc appears as unused devDependency
description: compodoc: false flags in angular.json were mistaken for evidence of a compodoc install. Verified: @compodoc/compodoc is not in package.json devDependencies. The flags are Storybook builder options to skip compodoc-sourced docs. No action needed.
resolvedNote: Verified clean — @compodoc/compodoc not in package.json; compodoc:false is a Storybook builder flag. PR #20.

title: rxjs appears as a near-unused runtime dependency
description: Zero from 'rxjs' imports in shipped source. rxjs is correctly listed only in peerDependencies of each ng-package.json (Angular provides it transitively), not in package.json dependencies. Verified clean.
resolvedNote: Verified clean — rxjs is a peerDependency only; not in runtime dependencies. PR #20.

title: Toolchain current, no advisories, size budgets enforced — verified clean
description: npm audit --omit=dev → 0 vulnerabilities. Angular 22, TypeScript 6, ng-packagr 22, Storybook 10.4 — consistent major versions. size-limit budgets per entry (7–12 KB) configured. GitHub Actions SHA-pinned. Dependency health is strong.
resolvedNote: Informational — verified clean, no action needed.

title: Unguarded touches[0] in SwipeAction onTouchStart and onTouchMove
description: e.touches[0] is assigned to const t then t.clientX is accessed with no null check in both onTouchStart (line 78) and onTouchMove (line 87). If the touchlist is empty the component throws. Fix: add if (!t) return; after each const t = e.touches[0];

title: Un-memoized toLocaleDateString in Calendar.formatDayLabel()
description: formatDayLabel() calls date.toLocaleDateString(this.locale(), {...}) on every invocation, creating an Intl formatter each time. The method is called ~42 times per calendar render. The existing _fmt computed() pattern already handles this for other formatters. Fix: add a computed dayLabelFmt = computed(() => new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale(), {weekday:'long',month:'long',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'})) and use it inside formatDayLabel().

title: Raw document.activeElement in DropdownMenu — use DOCUMENT token
description: dropdown-menu.ts:84 references the global document directly instead of the injected DOCUMENT token. This breaks SSR and sandboxed environments. Fix: inject DOCUMENT and replace document.activeElement with this.doc.activeElement.

title: Raw document.addEventListener in ResizablePanelGroup — use DOCUMENT token
description: resizable-panel-group.ts:101-157 attaches and removes pointermove/pointerup listeners on the global document directly instead of via an injected DOCUMENT token. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT; use this.doc.addEventListener/removeEventListener.

title: Raw document.addEventListener in CarouselContent — use DOCUMENT token
description: carousel-content.ts:39-55 attaches and removes a pointerup listener on the global document directly. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT; use this.doc.addEventListener/removeEventListener.

title: Raw document.activeElement in TabList — use DOCUMENT token
description: tab-list.ts:42 reads document.activeElement directly for keyboard focus tracking. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT; use this.doc.activeElement.

title: Raw document.activeElement in Menubar — use DOCUMENT token
description: menubar.ts:47 reads document.activeElement directly. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT; use this.doc.activeElement.

title: Raw document.body fallback in SwipeAction — use DOCUMENT token
description: swipe-action.ts:124 falls back to document.body as a host element. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT; use this.doc.body as fallback.

title: Raw document.activeElement in Command — use DOCUMENT token
description: command.ts:73 reads document.activeElement directly for focus management. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT; use this.doc.activeElement.

title: Raw document.* throughout Tooltip overlay lifecycle — use DOCUMENT token
description: tooltip.ts:77-100 uses document.addEventListener, document.createElement, and document.body.appendChild directly for overlay creation and escape-key handling. Breaks SSR. Fix: inject DOCUMENT and replace all document.* references with this.doc.*

title: tooltip.css lacks :focus-visible rule
description: tooltip.css has :hover-triggered display rules but no :focus-visible counterpart. Keyboard users who focus a tooltip trigger via Tab will not see the tooltip appear. Fix: add a :focus-visible selector mirroring the :hover tooltip display rule.

title: label.css lacks :focus-visible rule
description: label.css has hover/cursor selectors but no :focus-visible. Verify if Label is interactive; if so, add :focus-visible styles.

title: scroll-area.css lacks :focus-visible rule
description: scroll-area.css has :hover rules but no :focus-visible. Verify keyboard focusability of the scroll area; add :focus-visible if it receives focus.

title: toast-container.css lacks :focus-visible rule
description: toast-container.css has interactive button patterns but no :focus-visible rule for dismiss buttons. Keyboard users cannot see focus on toast dismiss targets. Fix: add :focus-visible to dismiss button selectors.

title: Property name mismatch in InputOtp.setDisabledState: cvaDisabled vs _cvaDisabled
description: input-otp.ts:187 calls this.cvaDisabled.set(isDisabled) but the actual private field is _cvaDisabled. This is a runtime error: calling .set() on undefined. Fix: use this._cvaDisabled.set(isDisabled).

title: Non-null assertion on ViewChild trackRef in Slider
description: slider.ts:43 declares @ViewChild trackRef!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>. The ! assertion bypasses the null check; if accessed before the view initialises it throws. Fix: migrate to viewChild() signal: private readonly trackRef = viewChild<ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>>('trackRef'); guard with if (!trackRef()) return; before use.

title: Non-null assertion on value() signal in Calendar linkedSignal
description: calendar.ts:82 uses this.value()! inside linkedSignal without a null guard. value() is typed as nullable; the assertion is invalid. Fix: capture to const v = this.value(); return v ?? null.

title: Non-null assertion on minDate() signal in Calendar weeks computed
description: calendar.ts:139 calls norm(this.minDate()!) without a prior null guard. Fix: const md = this.minDate(); const min = md ? norm(md) : null.

title: Non-null assertion on ViewChild canvasRef in Chart
description: chart.ts:44 uses @ViewChild('canvasRef') canvasRef!: ElementRef<HTMLCanvasElement>. Accessed in an effect without a null guard. Fix: migrate to viewChild() signal and guard with if (!this.canvasRef()) return;

title: Missing booleanAttribute transform on closeOnSelect input in ContextMenu
description: context-menu.ts:61 declares closeOnSelect = input(true) without { transform: booleanAttribute }. String values like 'false' from HTML templates will be coerced to truthy. Fix: input(true, { transform: booleanAttribute }).

title: Missing booleanAttribute transform on destructive input in AlertDialog
description: alert-dialog.ts:42 declares destructive = input(false) without { transform: booleanAttribute }. String values from HTML will not be coerced correctly. Fix: input(false, { transform: booleanAttribute }).

title: Unsafe cast to Element before optional chaining in Combobox
description: combobox.ts:94 writes (event.target as Element)?.closest('mui-combobox'). The cast bypasses TypeScript narrowing: if event.target is null the cast hides it. Fix: const t = event.target; if (t instanceof Element) t.closest('mui-combobox');

title: Dead check testing if asReadonly method exists in MobileNav
description: mobile-nav.ts:45 checks self.activeItem.asReadonly ? self.activeItem.asReadonly() : self.activeItem. asReadonly() is always on the Signal prototype; the ternary is dead code and misleads readers. Fix: use self.activeItem.asReadonly() directly.

title: Optional chaining before bracket dataset access in Menubar
description: menubar.ts:57 uses menuEl?.dataset['menubarMenuId'] ?? null. Bracket notation on dataset works but is less readable and harder to rename-refactor. Fix: use menuEl?.dataset.menubarMenuId ?? null.

title: Missing return type annotation on Toggle.isDisabled arrow field
description: toggle.ts:52 declares protected readonly isDisabled = () => this.disabled() || this._cvaDisabled() without an explicit return type. Fix: add (): boolean => to the arrow signature.

title: CVA boilerplate duplicated across 5 form controls
description: calendar.ts, date-picker.ts, input-otp.ts, slider.ts, and toggle.ts each independently declare _onChange, _onTouched, cvaDisabled fields and a full ControlValueAccessor implementation. This is 5× duplicated logic (15+ lines per component). Tracked as DD-3. Fix: extract a useCva<T>() composition helper and inject via class mixin or factory.

title: getBoundingClientRect positioning logic duplicated in 3 components
description: tooltip.ts, slider.ts, and resizable-panel-group.ts each implement independent getBoundingClientRect-based positioning calculations. Tracked as DD-1. Fix: unify into a shared computePosition() utility once DD-1 is resolved.

title: CarouselContent has pointer-drag logic but no spec file
description: carousel-content.ts implements document.addEventListener('pointerup') lifecycle for drag-to-scroll but has no .spec.ts. Mobile is the library's primary target and pointer paths must be tested. Fix: add carousel-content.spec.ts covering pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup drag gesture and cleanup-on-destroy.

title: ResizablePanelGroup has pointer-drag logic but no spec file
description: resizable-panel-group.ts attaches document-level pointermove/pointerup listeners for drag-resize but has no .spec.ts. Fix: add resizable-panel-group.spec.ts covering drag resize, min/max clamping, and listener cleanup in ngOnDestroy.

title: TabList keyboard-navigation compound widget has no isolated spec
description: tab-list.ts implements roving-tabindex Arrow/Home/End key handling but no tab-list.spec.ts exists; the parent tabs.spec.ts does not verify TabList keyboard nav directly. Fix: add tab-list.spec.ts asserting ArrowRight/ArrowLeft/Home/End navigation between tabs.

title: Command sub-components (6 files) have no individual spec files
description: command-input.ts, command-item.ts, command-list.ts, command-group.ts, command-empty.ts, command-separator.ts all lack spec files. Search filtering and item activation logic lives here. Fix: add command-input.spec.ts verifying search filtering; command-item.spec.ts verifying selection and keyboard activation.

title: Dropdown sub-components (3 files) have no individual spec files
description: dropdown-trigger.ts, dropdown-item.ts, dropdown-separator.ts each lack spec files. Fix: add specs for item keyboard activation (Enter/Space), aria-role assertions, and separator role.

title: Popover missing focus/Escape/return-focus E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec exists for Popover. Required: (1) focus moves into popover on open, (2) Escape closes it, (3) focus returns to trigger after close. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/popover.e2e.ts.

title: HoverCard missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for HoverCard. Required: hover/focus trigger opens card, Escape closes, focus returns. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/hover-card.e2e.ts.

title: ContextMenu missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for ContextMenu. Required: right-click opens menu, Escape closes, focus management. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/context-menu.e2e.ts with page.mouse.click({button:'right'}).

title: Command palette missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for Command. Required: type to filter, ArrowDown/Up navigate items, Enter selects, Escape closes. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/command.e2e.ts.

title: Combobox missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for Combobox. Required: click opens dropdown, type to filter, select item, Escape closes. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/combobox.e2e.ts.

title: Sheet missing focus/Escape/return-focus E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for Sheet. Required: focus trap on open, Escape closes, focus returns to trigger. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/sheet.e2e.ts.

title: AlertDialog missing focus-trap and no-Escape E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for AlertDialog. AlertDialog must NOT close on Escape (unlike Dialog). Required: verify focus trap, verify Escape does not dismiss. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/alert-dialog.e2e.ts.

title: BottomSheet missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for BottomSheet. Required: focus trap on open, Escape closes, focus returns to trigger. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/bottom-sheet.e2e.ts.

title: SwipeAction missing pointer-simulation E2E
description: No Playwright spec for SwipeAction swipe gesture. Required: page.mouse.move() drag simulation revealing the action, and drag-back to reset. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/swipe-action.e2e.ts.

title: Slider missing pointer-drag E2E
description: No Playwright spec for Slider handle dragging. Required: page.mouse.down on handle, move to new position, assert value updated. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/slider.e2e.ts.

title: FAB missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for FAB. Required: click triggers action, loading state disables interaction, disabled state blocks click. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/fab.e2e.ts.

title: MobileNav missing E2E coverage
description: No Playwright spec for MobileNav. Required: click nav item sets active state, aria-current updates, value emitted. Fix: add projects/ui/e2e/mobile-nav.e2e.ts.

title: vite high-severity NTLMv2 hash disclosure vulnerability
description: npm audit reports a high-severity vulnerability in vite via launch-editor: NTLMv2 hash disclosure via UNC path handling on Windows. Affects dev and CI environments. Fix: upgrade vite to a patched version or add an npm override for launch-editor to >=2.7.0.

title: js-yaml Quadratic DoS in @changesets toolchain
description: npm audit reports a moderate vulnerability in js-yaml (Quadratic-complexity DoS via repeated merge key aliases) pulled in through the @changesets/cli → read-yaml-file → js-yaml chain. Fix: add npm override in package.json: "js-yaml": ">=4.1.0".

title: @babel/core Arbitrary File Read via sourceMappingURL comment
description: npm audit reports a low-severity vulnerability in @babel/core (Arbitrary File Read via sourceMappingURL comment) pulled in through @angular/build. Dev-only, no production surface. Fix: upgrade @angular/build to pick up a patched babel version, or accept the risk as dev-only.
